caption: A man wearing black headphones and a dark jacket is seated in a recording studio against a backdrop of dark, ribbed acoustic foam panels. He is positioned behind a professional microphone on a boom arm. Initially, he is laughing heartily with his mouth wide open and eyes squinted. As the sequence progresses, his expression shifts from intense laughter to a broad smile, and eventually to a more subtle, knowing grin. He glances slightly to the side toward the end of the clip while maintaining his smile. The lighting is focused on his face, highlighting his facial features and expressions throughout the transition. There is no on-screen text or logos visible in the scene.
